signals.headline: Russia announced a temporary **32-hour ceasefire** in Ukraine for Orthodox Easter on April 10, ordered by Putin and reci
signals.raw: Russia announced a temporary **32-hour ceasefire** in Ukraine for Orthodox Easter on April 10, ordered by Putin and reciprocated by Zelenskyy, but it ended amid reported Ukrainian strikes on Russian infrastructure by April 11.[2][3]
